behaviors.description: Only files changed in the pull request are analyzed — unchanged files are not scanned.
behaviors.justification: MOCK-MISS: failure is at module handoff (PR changed-file selection -> analyzer target set), not a single pure function. REAL-INFRA: behavior text does not require real network/OS/subprocess; a local in-process PR-diff fixture and repo fixture can reproduce it. REJECTION-GATE: rejected System because the behavior only says changed vs unchanged file selection, not real GitHub API or git CLI edge conditions.
behaviors.test_description: Wire changed-file collector, file enumerator, and analysis dispatcher together with a local repo fixture containing changed and unchanged files; assert only changed paths are passed to analysis.

behaviors.description: Findings are grouped by severity (error, warning, info) in the posted PR comment.
behaviors.justification: MOCK-MISS: grouping correctness spans findings aggregator + comment renderer + PR comment payload assembly. REAL-INFRA: can be validated with a fake PR client; real HTTP is not required for this behavior. LLM-DEP/MULTI-STEP: none. REJECTION-GATE: rejected System because behavior text focuses on grouping in comment content, not live GitHub posting reliability.
behaviors.test_description: Run pipeline components end-to-end in-process from findings input through markdown/comment payload generation; assert output has distinct error/warning/info sections with correct members.

behaviors.description: A pull request that touches 200 files completes analysis within the 10-minute Actions timeout.
behaviors.justification: REAL-INFRA: timeout/performance target is explicitly tied to GitHub Actions runtime, process execution, filesystem traversal, and wall-clock behavior. MOCK-HIDE: stubs/mocks can hide real process startup and I/O costs. REJECTION-GATE: rejected Integration because behavior text explicitly requires meeting a real Actions timeout budget.
behaviors.test_description: Execute the lint step as it runs in CI (or close replica) against a 200-file PR fixture and real linter invocation; measure wall-clock completion and assert under 10 minutes.

behaviors.description: When the linter process crashes on a malformed file, the remaining files are still analyzed and results posted.
behaviors.justification: REAL-INFRA: behavior explicitly depends on subprocess crash semantics. MOCK-HIDE: replacing linter with a mock exception can miss true crash/exit-code/stream-handling behavior. No LLM dependency. REJECTION-GATE: rejected Integration because concrete behavior text says 'linter process crashes,' which is an OS subprocess boundary.
behaviors.test_description: Run with the real linter subprocess on a corpus containing one malformed crash-triggering file plus valid files; assert pipeline continues, analyzes remaining files, and emits/posts aggregate results.

behaviors.description: Duplicate findings on the same line from overlapping rules are deduplicated in the output.
behaviors.justification: MOCK-MISS: core failure is local dedup logic (same file/line/rule overlap collapsing) and can be reproduced with direct inputs to dedup function/object. REAL-INFRA/LLM-DEP/MULTI-STEP: none. REJECTION-GATE: rejected Integration because behavior text is output deduplication semantics, with no required module boundary or external system interaction.
behaviors.test_description: Feed dedup component a set of findings containing intentional same-line overlaps from different rules; assert exactly one output entry per dedup key and stable retained metadata.
